*** 3 INJ *** AN EF1 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT 440 PM NEAR LITITZ...AND LIFTED BETWEEN LITITZ AND EPHRATA AT 445 PM. WHILE THE TORNADO PATH LENGTH WAS 1.25 MILES...WIDESPREAD DOWNBURST WIND DAMAGE ASSOCIATED WITH THE PARENT THUNDERSTORM CONTINUED WELL BEYOND THE TRACK OF THE TORNADO. PEAK WINDS WERE ESTIMATED AT 85-95 MPH.
